channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street sign damaged, 24th March
item.description:
Hi. All the ‘Brightling Road’ street signs are damaged, mouldy and blackened and need replacing. I’ve attached one picture but please change all 4 (left and right side of street, top and bottom of street). This has been like this for several years now. I’ve complained previously to the council but nothing has been done and it’s getting worse. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brightling Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the shelter, 24th March
item.description:
It’s black pain tag
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Owen Walk, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly Tipping, 24th March
item.description:

item.title: 10 inch wide 5 inch deep pothole, 24th March
item.description:
This pothole is dangerous and getting bigger daily

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fountain Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge overgrown, blocking pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Massive overgrown hedge taking all pavement area in front of 155 Amherst Drive. It's not possible to use payment in this strip of pavement. Full of litter in a front of this property, it's very neglected and vegetation and litter are overspill onto pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling reported 510535 still not cleaned up, 24th March
item.description:
Two dog poos 1. On tree area in front of 45/47 Shandon 2. On kerb in front of 39
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shandon Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can this tree be inspected and fallen branch removed?, 24th March
item.description:
Please remove this branch and inspect the tree.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Headge overgrowing onto pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Massive overgrown hedge taking all payment area in front of 226 Amherst Drive. It's not possible to use payment in this strip of pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 228, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Sharpe broken paving slabs, 24th March
item.description:
I tripped and nearly fell near bus stop near side entrance to bexleyheath shopping centre, Morley’s end. Saved from falling by person I was with. Really dangerous for elderly or children

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree has fallen in road due to weather, blocking half the road., 24th March
item.description:
Called into Bromley OOH - Tree has fallen in road due to weather, blocking half the road. Outside 12 Ash Grove, SE20 7RD
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Overhanging Tree, 24th March
item.description:
The tree in the back garden of 44 Bromley Road (I believe council owned) is significantly over hanging on the driveway of 49 Manor Road and the wider pavement and road of Manor Road. There is often significant debris (big branches) which will at some point cause an incident, damage a car or a person - if not addressed urgently.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped clothes, 24th March
item.description:
Dumped clothes and rubbish in alley between oakhapton and budleigh crescent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Budleigh Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carlton Vale NW6 5PX, 24th March
item.description:
Damaged leaning Street speed sign post at junction of Carlton Vale & Malvern Road NW6 5PX opposite Regal Court blocknof flats & Kilburn Park Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo seaton rd, 24th March
item.description:
Bag of dog poo on seaton road end meeting exmouth road behind yellow salt box. People often leave bags of poo here.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seaton Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
